metadata.title: StockAlarm — Free Multi-Chart Price Alert Dashboard
metadata.description: Monitor up to 12 stocks simultaneously with real-time charts and instant price target alerts. Free forever.

hero.title: Track Multiple Stocks.
hero.subtitle: Monitor up to 12 stocks on one screen. Set target prices. Get visual and audio alerts when prices hit your targets.

chart.addFirst: Add your first stock to start tracking

addStock.title: Add Stock
addStock.search: Search by ticker or company name...

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.error: Failed to send. Please try again.

howToUse.title: How to Use StockAlarm
howToUse.step1Desc: Click the '+ Add Stock' button and search for any ticker symbol. Add up to 12 stocks to your watchlist.
howToUse.step2Desc: Click on any chart card and enter your buy or sell target price. A red dashed line will appear on the chart.
howToUse.step3Desc: When a stock price reaches your target, the chart will glow and an alarm sound will play. Never miss an entry point again.
